docs.title: DevOps Knowledge Base
docs.text:
Welcome to the DevOps Knowledge Base.

This portal contains Terraform, Azure, Kubernetes, Docker, Linux, CI/CD, and Architecture documentation.

docs.title: Documentation Standards
docs.text:
• Every topic must include a definition.
  • Every topic must include a real example.
  • Every topic must include production use cases.
  • Every topic must include best practices.
  • Every topic must include troubleshooting notes.

docs.title: About
docs.text: This documentation portal is maintained as code using Git, Markdown, MkDocs Material, and Azure Static Web Apps.
